subcodes.first_line: The gaze of favor hath turned toward thee from the Most Great Prison, and maketh mention of thee, that perchance thou mayest be attracted by the divine verses [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: طرف عنایت از سجن اعظم بتو توجه نموده و ترا ذکر مینماید که شاید جذب آیات الهی
subcodes.subjects: @consolation and comfort, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @praise and encouragement
